actor.goal: to compute achieved maturity from observed receipts without manual override

story.iWant: to compute achieved maturity from observed receipts without manual override
story.soThat: the conveyor can report honest maturity and next proof gaps

acceptanceCriteria.statement: Achieved level is derived from observed evidence, not handwritten.
The next missing proof is projected when the current level is satisfied.
Every output surface is backed by a receipt.

forbiddenClaims: next level is claimed without proof
